title: sonerila zeylanica var. rostrata
intro: Sonerila zeylanica var. rostrata, also known as the Sri Lankan Sonerila, is a plant species belonging to the Sonerila genus, commonly found in the tropical regions of Sri Lanka. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Sonerila zeylanica var. rostrata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin infections, as well as its potential in managing diabetes and hypertension. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of a decoction or infusion, with its leaves and roots being used separately or in combination to create medicinal teas or tonics.
